text:
# From Legacy to Legendary Accelerating software delivery in modernization projects at Nationwide Building Society  
5  
|                                                             |    | Requirements                                                                                                                                                   | Design    &    Coding                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Unit Testing                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|-------------------------------------------------------------|----|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Mobile Banking App Modernization Legacy Sencha App Codebase |    | Reverse engineered to extract business requirements  ~25% reduction from manual code analysis and 80%+ accurate requirement extraction from legacy Sencha code | Figma  Native, React code / components auto generated  Generated Kotlin, Swift code & React, APIs and logic rapidly with adaptive suggestions  30% faster UI development  Automated code refactoring for has removed a low skills, manual process from development process   10% better code quality | Autogenerated Unit/Component Test cases & simulated edge cases  15% faster test cycles  Increased unit test automation resulted in ~30% reduction in testing defects (demonstrated in React) |
| Internet Banking Modernization Figma Designs to React Code  |    | N.A.                                                                                                                                                           | Figma  Native, React code / components auto generated  Generated Kotlin, Swift code & React, APIs and logic rapidly with adaptive suggestions  30% faster UI development  Automated code refactoring for has removed a low skills, manual process from development process   10% better code quality | Autogenerated Unit/Component Test cases & simulated edge cases  15% faster test cycles  Increased unit test automation resulted in ~30% reduction in testing defects (demonstrated in React) |
| Modernize Data Platform Teradata to Databricks Migration    |    | Reverse engineer Teradata Stored Procedures to understand the logic                                                                                            | Generate dbt code based on client frameworks, standards and guardrails 40% reduction in coding effort                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                              |  
Using IBM Science of Consulting  
icon  
icon  
icon  
icon  
The Nationwide delivery team is on a continuous journey of innovation. Taking on the challenge of productivity by bringing together the knowledge of the client context, and client provided GenAI tools – our teams were able to demonstrate quantitative benefits from live modernization enagements  
# From Legacy to Legendary Accelerating software delivery in modernization projects at Nationwide Building Society  
6  
Using IBM Science of Consulting  
Legacy Sencha App Codebase  
- Reverse engineered to extract business requirements
- Rebuilt in Java, Native, Swift & Kotlin via Copilot  
logo  
Accelerated development with Figma designs  
- Generated production ready code in React, Kotlin & Swift
- Co-Pilot provided with Client Design guideline files and precise specification and context for high quality code output  
logo  
Use of gen AI revealed hidden areas of inefficiency in SDLC  
- Prompted rethinking of processes
- Identified potential for Agentic AI integration  
logo  
Estimation models updated to deliver promised efficiency  
- Gen AI efficiencies are now getting baked in
- Sprint Planning is getting faster and smarter  
icon  
Clients want predictable outcomes & results  
Ran multiple POCs to seek, absorb and push Gen AI Limits  
- Careful Prompt -> Context Engineering, iterated over 2 months
- Discovered Copilot limitations, and built utilities for workarounds  
logo  
Evidence driven,  
quick iterations  
Collaborated deeply with client stakeholders  
- Tech Architects
- Product Owners
- Code Owners
- Brought them along the learning curve  
icon  
Open Collaboration  
Client challenge  
- Reduce time taken for modernizing projects by 30-40%
- Architects, Developers, Testers utilized their expertise of existing apps, applied it with newly acquired GenAI tooling knowledge to take on challenge  
logo  
Experts across squads  
Experts across squads
name: Chunk 4/8

raw_entities.name: Nationwide Building Society
raw_entities.description: A major UK financial services institution undergoing comprehensive digital and data platform modernization. The client is actively partnering with IBM to accelerate software delivery, reduce legacy technical debt, and integrate GenAI tools into their SDLC to meet aggressive productivity and timeline targets.

raw_entities.name: IBM Science of Consulting
raw_entities.description: IBM's proprietary consulting and delivery methodology applied to drive innovation and quantitative benefits in client modernization engagements. It serves as the foundational approach for structuring AI-driven development, stakeholder collaboration, and iterative proof-of-concept cycles.

raw_entities.name: Software Modernization Engagements
raw_entities.description: A suite of targeted software delivery and modernization initiatives focused on migrating legacy codebases and data platforms to modern, cloud-native architectures. These engagements leverage AI-assisted development to accelerate delivery and improve code quality.
context: Modernize Data Platform Teradata to Databricks Migration

raw_entities.name: Legacy Code Reverse Engineering
raw_entities.description: The ability to systematically analyze and deconstruct outdated codebases to extract underlying business logic and requirements. This capability enables the transition from legacy systems to modern architectures by providing accurate foundational documentation for redevelopment.
context: Reverse engineered to extract business requirements
Reverse engineer Teradata Stored Procedures to understand the logic

raw_entities.name: AI-Driven Code Generation & Refactoring
raw_entities.description: The use of AI assistants to automatically generate, refactor, and suggest code across multiple programming languages and frameworks. This capability removes low-skill manual processes, accelerates UI development, and improves overall code quality through automated refactoring.
context: Generated Kotlin, Swift code & React, APIs and logic rapidly with adaptive suggestions
Automated code refactoring for has removed a low skills, manual process

raw_entities.name: AI-Driven Test Automation
raw_entities.description: The capability to automatically generate unit and component test cases, including simulated edge cases, to improve testing speed and reduce software defects. This automation streamlines the testing lifecycle and increases confidence in code deployments.
context: Autogenerated Unit/Component Test cases & simulated edge cases
Increased unit test automation resulted in ~30% reduction in testing defects

raw_entities.name: Prompt & Context Engineering
raw_entities.description: The disciplined process of crafting, iterating, and refining AI prompts and context inputs to maximize tool output quality. This capability was critical for overcoming platform limitations and building workarounds during the modernization journey.
context: Careful Prompt -> Context Engineering, iterated over 2 months
Discovered Copilot limitations, and built utilities for workarounds

raw_entities.name: Mobile Banking App Modernization
raw_entities.description: The modernization of a legacy mobile banking application originally built on a Sencha codebase. The use case involves reverse-engineering legacy logic, generating production-ready React code, and automating testing to accelerate delivery and improve quality.
context: Mobile Banking App Modernization Legacy Sencha App Codebase
Reverse engineered to extract business requirements
Figma  Native, React code / components auto generated

raw_entities.name: Internet Banking Platform Modernization
raw_entities.description: The transformation of internet banking interfaces from Figma design specifications into production-ready code across multiple platforms. This use case leverages automated code generation to rapidly convert designs into React, Kotlin, and Swift components.
context: Internet Banking Modernization Figma Designs to React Code
Generated production ready code in React, Kotlin & Swift

raw_entities.name: Data Platform Migration
raw_entities.description: The migration of a legacy Teradata data platform to a modern Databricks cloud data platform. This use case focuses on reverse-engineering stored procedures, generating dbt code based on client standards, and significantly reducing manual coding effort.
context: Modernize Data Platform Teradata to Databricks Migration
Generate dbt code based on client frameworks, standards and guardrails

raw_entities.name: Accelerated UI Development Speed
raw_entities.description: A measurable reduction in the time required to develop user interfaces, driven by automated code generation and adaptive AI suggestions. This benefit directly addresses client goals for faster delivery and improved productivity.
context: Reduced time taken for modernizing projects by 30-40%

raw_entities.name: Enhanced Code Quality & Maintainability
raw_entities.description: An improvement in the overall quality and maintainability of generated code, achieved through automated refactoring and precise specification context. This benefit reduces technical debt and supports long-term platform stability.
context: Estimation models updated to deliver promised efficiency

raw_entities.name: Reduced Testing Defects & Faster Cycles
raw_entities.description: A significant decrease in software defects and faster test execution cycles, achieved through automated unit and component test case generation. This benefit increases deployment confidence and reduces post-release risk.
context: ~30% reduction in testing defects (demonstrated in React)
Autogenerated Unit/Component Test cases & simulated edge cases

raw_entities.name: Significant Coding Effort Reduction
raw_entities.description: A substantial decrease in manual coding workload and high-accuracy requirement extraction, driven by AI-assisted development processes. This benefit directly supports the client's explicit goal of reducing modernization project timelines by 30-40%.

raw_entities.name: Legacy System Constraints
raw_entities.description: The technical debt and operational friction associated with maintaining and modernizing outdated, monolithic legacy codebases. These constraints create bottlenecks in development and require systematic reverse engineering to overcome.

raw_entities.name: Project Timeline Pressure
raw_entities.description: The client's explicit requirement to significantly accelerate modernization project delivery timelines to meet business productivity goals. This pressure drives the adoption of AI tools and iterative proof-of-concept methodologies.
context: Reduce time taken for modernizing projects by 30-40%

raw_entities.name: AI Tool Limitations & Skill Gaps
raw_entities.description: The reliance on manual, low-skill coding tasks that are inefficient and prone to error, combined with the initial limitations of GenAI tools. Overcoming these challenges required careful prompt engineering, iterative testing, and the development of custom workarounds.
context: removed a low skills, manual process
Discovered Copilot limitations, and built utilities for workarounds
revealed hidden areas of inefficiency in SDLC

raw_entities.name: IBM Copilot
raw_entities.description: An AI-powered coding assistant used to generate, refactor, and suggest code across multiple programming languages and frameworks. It serves as the core engine for accelerating development, though it required careful context engineering to overcome initial limitations.
context: Copilot provided with Client Design guideline files
Discovered Copilot limitations, and built utilities for workarounds

raw_entities.name: Figma
raw_entities.description: A design and prototyping platform used as a source of truth for generating production-ready frontend code and components. It enables the automated translation of visual designs into React, Kotlin, and Swift code.
context: Figma  Native, React code / components auto generated

raw_entities.name: Teradata
raw_entities.description: A legacy enterprise data warehousing platform whose stored procedures and logic were reverse-engineered for migration. It represents the outdated infrastructure driving the need for modernization.
context: Modernize Data Platform Teradata to Databricks

raw_entities.name: Databricks
raw_entities.description: A modern cloud-based data and AI platform serving as the target environment for the client's data platform migration. It replaces legacy Teradata infrastructure and supports modern data transformation workflows.
context: Modernize Data Platform Teradata to Databricks

raw_entities.name: dbt (data build tool)
raw_entities.description: A data transformation framework used to generate SQL-based data models and transformations according to client standards. It enables the automated generation of dbt code based on established guardrails and frameworks.
context: Generate dbt code based on client frameworks, standards and guardrails

raw_entities.name: Evidence-Driven Iterative Delivery
raw_entities.description: A delivery approach focused on rapid prototyping, continuous testing, and data-backed validation to prove value and overcome tool limitations. This methodology ensures predictable outcomes by iteratively pushing AI boundaries and refining processes.
context: Ran multiple POCs to seek, absorb and push Gen AI Limits
Careful Prompt -> Context Engineering, iterated over 2 months

raw_entities.name: Deep Client Collaboration & Stakeholder Alignment
raw_entities.description: A highly collaborative engagement model that actively involves client architects, product owners, and code owners in the modernization journey. This approach brings stakeholders along the learning curve and ensures shared ownership of outcomes.
context: Brought them along the learning curve

raw_entities.name: Expert Cross-Functional Squads
raw_entities.description: The deployment of highly skilled, cross-functional teams combining deep domain knowledge with emerging GenAI tooling expertise. These experts leverage their understanding of existing apps to drive productivity and overcome legacy constraints.
context: Architects, Developers, Testers utilized their expertise

raw_entities.name: Client Stakeholders
raw_entities.description: Key client-side technical and business contributors involved in the modernization process, including tech architects, product owners, and code owners. These individuals were actively engaged to align on goals, share expertise, and adopt new AI-driven workflows.

raw_entities.name: IBM
raw_entities.description: The primary technology and consulting vendor delivering the modernization solutions and AI-driven development services. IBM provides the Science of Consulting framework, expert squads, and GenAI tooling to accelerate client modernization projects.
context: The Nationwide delivery team is on a continuous journey of innovation

raw_entities.name: Proof of Concept (POC) Cycles
raw_entities.description: A series of iterative proof-of-concept engagements designed to test AI tool capabilities, identify limitations, and develop workarounds. These POCs were critical for validating GenAI effectiveness and refining prompt engineering over a two-month period.
context: Ran multiple POCs to seek, absorb and push Gen AI Limits
Discovered Copilot limitations, and built utilities for workarounds

pain_points: need to reduce modernization time by 30-40%

what_it_does: extracts business requirements and logic from legacy codebases
differentiating_aspect: automates extraction using GenAI, reducing manual effort

what_it_does: generates production-ready code and refactors legacy components
differentiating_aspect: rapid generation with adaptive suggestions and automated refactoring

what_it_does: automates unit/component test case generation and edge case simulation
differentiating_aspect: drives significant defect reduction through automation

what_it_does: crafts precise prompts and context to optimize AI tool outputs
differentiating_aspect: iterative refinement to push AI limits and build workarounds

problem_context: modernizing legacy Sencha-based mobile banking app
approach: reverse engineering requirements, AI code generation, automated testing
outcome_achieved: 30% faster UI development, 10% better code quality, ~30% reduction in testing defects

problem_context: modernizing internet banking platform from Figma designs to React
approach: AI-driven code generation from designs, automated refactoring and testing
outcome_achieved: 30% faster UI development, 10% better code quality, ~30% reduction in testing defects

problem_context: migrating data platform from Teradata to Databricks
approach: reverse engineering stored procedures, generating dbt code aligned with client standards

root_cause: aging Sencha codebase and Teradata stored procedures
business_impact: slows modernization, increases manual effort and skill dependency
current_workaround: manual code analysis and low-skill manual processes

root_cause: demand for faster modernization and predictable delivery
business_impact: risk of missed deadlines and increased costs

root_cause: GenAI tooling limitations and team's initial lack of GenAI expertise
business_impact: potential for suboptimal outputs and slower adoption
current_workaround: careful prompt-context engineering, iterative POCs, building custom utilities

key_characteristics: generates production-ready code, provides adaptive suggestions, requires precise context
provides design guidelines and specifications for AI code generation
legacy data platform with stored procedures requiring reverse engineering
generates data transformation code aligned with client frameworks and guardrails

competitive_advantage: uses rapid POCs and iterative cycles to validate AI capabilities and push limits
evidence_or_proof_point: demonstrated quantitative benefits from live modernization engagements

competitive_advantage: integrates client stakeholders directly into the delivery process to align on outcomes and upskill teams
evidence_or_proof_point: active involvement of Tech Architects, Product Owners, and Code Owners

competitive_advantage: combines deep domain expertise with emerging GenAI skills to drive efficiency
evidence_or_proof_point: cross-functional teams of Architects, Developers, and Testers leveraging existing app knowledge with GenAI

key_characteristics: provides consulting framework, AI tools (Copilot), and delivery expertise
